Package org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm.instruction

package org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm.instruction
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project.prover.rules.matcher.vm
     
  • Class
    Description
    CheckNodeKindInstruction
    A MatchInstruction that verifies whether the current SyntaxElement is an instance of a specific node type.
    GotoNextInstruction
    A VMInstruction that advances the PoolSyntaxElementCursor to the next element in the current syntax structure.
    GotoNextSiblingInstruction
    A VMInstruction that moves the PoolSyntaxElementCursor to the next sibling of the current syntax element.
    MatchIdentityInstruction
    A MatchInstruction that checks for syntactic identity between the current SyntaxElement and a predefined reference element.
    MatchInstruction
    A specialized VMInstruction for match operations that do not navigate or modify the PoolSyntaxElementCursor, but operate directly on the current SyntaxElement to which the cursor points.
    VMInstruction
    Represents a single instruction in the matching virtual machine used by the KeY system.
